car.new:
Car Insurance pitch (Naya Customer):

"Bhaiya, gadi toh le li — lekin ek accident mein sab kuch jaata hai. MMFSL car insurance mein zero depreciation cover, cashless repair, 24/7 claim support."

"Loan bhi hamare paas, insurance bhi hamare paas — ek hi jagah sab."

Close: "RC do — 10 minute mein cover ho jaata hai."
car.existing:
Car Insurance pitch (Existing Customer):

"Bhaiya, aapne MMFSL se gadi li — ab insurance bhi hamare paas rakho. Claim ke waqt ek hi jagah se help milegi."

"Zero dep cover mein full repair milti hai — pocket se kuch nahi."

Close: "RC number do — loan ke saath bundled rate milti hai."

tractor.new:
Tractor Insurance pitch (Naya Customer):

"Bhaiya, tractor nahi chala toh fasal nahi hogi. Ek chot mein 2-3 mahine bandh — tab kya karoge?"

Engine damage, accident, theft sab cover. Harvest season mein claim fast track.

Close: "Tractor number do — aaj hi cover, EMI mein add ho jaata hai."
tractor.existing:
Tractor Insurance pitch (Existing Customer):

"Bhaiya, loan hamare paas hai — insurance bhi lo. Ek hi number pe sab."

"Loan ki EMI ke saath insurance add karte hain — alag se kuch nahi karna."

Close: "Tractor number do — 15 minute mein ho jaata hai."

truck.new:
Commercial Vehicle Insurance (Naya Customer):

"Bhai, truck/tempo ek din bandh hua toh income band. Third party compulsory hai — lekin MMFSL mein comprehensive lo: accident, theft, driver injury sab."

Close: "RC aur permit number do — abhi quote nikalta hoon."
truck.existing:
Commercial Vehicle Insurance (Existing Customer):

"Bhai, loan hamare paas hai — insurance bhi hamare paas lo. Claim ke waqt ek hi jagah se help milegi."

Close: "RC number batao — bundled rate milti hai."

rickshaw.existing:
Rickshaw Insurance (Existing Customer):

"Bhai, loan hamare paas hai — insurance bhi lo. EMI mein add karte hain — alag se kuch nahi."

Close: "RC number do — 10 minute mein."

bus.new:
Passenger Vehicle Insurance (Naya Customer):

"Bhai, bus/taxi mein passengers hain — unka risk bhi aap pe. Passenger liability cover bhi milta hai saath mein."

Close: "Permit number aur RC do — sahi plan batata hoon."
bus.existing:
Passenger Vehicle Insurance (Existing Customer):

"Bhai, commercial loan hamare paas hai — insurance bhi lo. Passenger liability cover zaroori hai."

Close: "RC number batao — abhi quote."

bike.new:
Two-Wheeler Insurance (Naya Customer):

"Bhaiya, bike ka insurance compulsory hai — bina insurance pakde toh fine, accident mein pocket se bhi. Comprehensive cover lo."

Close: "RC number do — 5 minute mein policy."
bike.existing:
Two-Wheeler Insurance (Existing Customer):

"Bhai, loan hamare paas hai — insurance bhi lo. EMI mein add karte hain."

Close: "RC number batao — abhi ho jaata hai."

life.new:
Life Insurance HDFC (Naya Customer):

"Bhaiya, loan toh le liya — lekin agar kuch ho gaya toh ghar waale EMI kahan se bharenge? MMFSL mein HDFC Life ka term plan milta hai — Rs.500/month mein Rs.50 lakh ka cover."

Close: "Loan document saath hai? Life cover bhi add ho jaata hai — alag kuch nahi karna."
life.existing:
Life Insurance HDFC (Existing Customer):

"Bhaiya, MMFSL ne aapka kaam aasan kiya — ek aur kaam karein. HDFC Life ka term plan add karo. Agar kuch hua toh loan bhi maaf, family ko paise bhi."

Yeh loan protection ke roop mein pitch karo.

Close: "Loan ke saath term plan add karte hain — ek hi jagah sab."

car.new:
Car Loan pitch (Naya Customer):

"Bhaiya, aaj gadi lo — ek paisa nahi chahiye pocket se, 100% MMFSL dega."

Features:
- 100% ex-showroom funding
- Maruti/Hyundai/Tata/Mahindra sab brands
- 5 saal tenure, collateral nahi
- Field officer ghar aata hai

Close: "Kaunsi gadi pasand hai? Aaj hi quote nikalta hoon."
car.existing:
Car Loan pitch (Existing Customer):

"Bhaiya, aapne pehle MMFSL se loan liya — process kitna aasan tha? Dobaara utni hi asaani se lo."

Pre-approved track record hai — approval aur fast hogi.

Close: "Kaunsi gadi dekhi hai? Main aaj hi process shuru karta hoon."

tractor.new:
Tractor Loan pitch (Naya Customer):

"Kiraye ke tractor mein fasal late hoti hai na? Sahi waqt pe kaam nahi hota?"

MMFSL offer:
- 90% tak funding
- Harvest EMI — pehle 6 mahine koi EMI nahi!
- 2 din mein approval
- Mahindra, John Deere, TAFE, Sonalika sab brands

Close: "Aaj kagaz do — parson tractor ghar."
tractor.existing:
Tractor Loan pitch (Existing Customer):

"Bhaiya, aapka pehle wala loan timely tha — isiliye aapka record acha hai. Naye tractor ke liye fast approval hoga."

Harvest EMI option: pehle 6 mahine koi EMI nahi.

Close: "Kaunsa tractor dekhna hai? Chalo saath chalte hain."

truck.new:
Commercial Vehicle Loan (Naya Customer):

"Apna truck = contractor ki naukri nahi, khud malik bano."

- LTV 85% tak, 5 saal tenure
- Route permit = income proof (ITR nahi chahiye!)
- Trucks, tempos, buses sab

Close: "Route permit hai? Bas wahi kaafi hai — aaj apply karte hain."
truck.existing:
Commercial Vehicle Loan (Existing Customer):

"Bhai, aapka track record MMFSL mein acha hai — naye vehicle ke liye fast track approval milti hai."

Route permit = income proof, ITR nahi chahiye.

Close: "Permit number do — 2 din mein loan."

preowned.new:
Pre-Owned Vehicle Loan (Naya Customer):

"Budget mein purani gaadi lo — MMFSL loan dega! Purani Maruti, Honda, Hyundai pe bhi loan milta hai."

EMI Rs.5,000 se shuru. Doorstep service bhi milti hai.

Yeh bahut kam log jaante hain — aapka differentiator!

Close: "Kaunsi gaadi dekhi hai? Quote nikalta hoon."
preowned.existing:
Pre-Owned Vehicle Loan (Existing Customer):

"Bhai, pehle se MMFSL customer ho — pre-owned pe bhi fast approval milta hai."

Close: "Kaunsi gaadi hai? Main aaj hi process karta hoon."

home.new:
Home Loan pitch (Naya Customer):

"Pucca ghar banana hai? MMFSL kar dega — sirf kagaz lao."

- Rural/semi-urban India ke liye specially
- Rate 9.29% se shuru
- Minimal documentation
- Doorstep service

Close: "Plot apna hai ya khareedna bhi hai? Batao."
home.existing:
Home Loan pitch (Existing Customer):

"Bhaiya, MMFSL se pehle loan liya — ghar ke liye bhi hamare paas aao."

Existing customer ko priority processing milti hai.

Close: "Kitne ka ghar banana hai? EMI calculate karta hoon."

sme.new:
SME/Business Loan pitch (Naya Customer):

"Dukaan badhani hai? Machine chahiye? MMFSL 2 din mein decision deta hai — bank se fast, kam kagaz."

- Business Loan, Machinery Loan, LAP
- 2 saal purana business chahiye

Close: "Business kitne saal purana hai? Best option batata hoon."
sme.existing:
SME/Business Loan pitch (Existing Customer):

"Bhai, aapka MMFSL se relationship hai — business loan mein bhi priority milegi."

Machinery loan mein naya ya purana equipment dono cover.

Close: "Kaunsi machine chahiye? Main aaj hi quote nikalta hoon."

personal.new:
Personal/Suvidha Loan pitch (Naya Customer):

"Rs.50,000 se Rs.15 lakh tak — digital process, kuch ghante mein approve."

Close: "Kitna chahiye aur kab tak? Abhi process shuru karte hain."
personal.existing:
Suvidha Loan pitch (Existing Customer):

"Bhaiya, aap pehle se MMFSL customer hain — Suvidha Loan aapke liye pre-approved hai. Vehicle asset pe secured, poori tarah online."

Sabse fast option existing customers ke liye.

Close: "Kitna chahiye? Main abhi check karta hoon."

fd.new:
Fixed Deposit pitch (Naya Customer):

"Bank se zyada return chahiye? MMFSL mein CRISIL/ICRA AAA rated FD lo — 7.35% tak."

Samruddhi: regular monthly interest
Dhanvruddhi: cumulative — zyada return

Rs.5,000 se shuru, senior citizens +0.35%.

Close: "Aaj kitna rakhna hai? Form laata hoon."
fd.existing:
Fixed Deposit pitch (Existing Customer):

"Bhaiya, loan MMFSL se liya — bachat bhi MMFSL mein rakho. 7.35% tak return, Mahindra ka naam."

Existing customers ke liye quick process.

Close: "Kitna amount rakhna hai? Abhi form karte hain."

objections.rate:
Rate/Byaj Zyada Hai:

Reframe karo: "Bhaiya, rate se zyada faida dekho."

Hisaab dikhao:
- Tractor EMI = Rs.11,000/month
- Apna tractor hone se fasal = Rs.2-3 lakh zyada
- EMI ek hafte mein nikal aayi!

Phir poochho: "Kaunsi bank ne kam rate diya? Batao — MMFSL negotiate bhi karta hai."

Kabhi defend mat karo — return dikhao.
objections.trust:
"Yeh wahi Mahindra hai jiska tractor aapke khet mein chal raha hai — 32 saal purani, NSE/BSE listed, RBI registered, 1 crore+ customers."

Local proof: "Aapke gaon mein bhi customers hain — unse pooch lo."

Mahindra naam hi trust hai.
objections.budget:
"Isliye toh MMFSL hai — aaj ek paisa nahi chahiye. Sirf kagaz do, 2 din mein loan pass."

EMI choti karo: 5 saal = Rs.5,000-6,000/month
Harvest EMI: pehle 6 mahine ZERO!

"Abhi paisa nahi" = "abhi loan lo" — yeh unhe samjhao.
objections.delay:
Urgency banao: "Bilkul sochiye bhaiya. Bas — yeh scheme [date] tak hai, baad mein EMI zyada."

Appointment fix karo: "Kal subah 10 baje ya shaam 5 baje?" — do options do. Aaj hi confirm karo.
objections.bank:
Bank vs MMFSL:
- Bank mein ITR chahiye — MMFSL mein zameen ke kagaz
- Bank ke chakkar — MMFSL ghar aata hai
- Bank 2-3 hafte — MMFSL 2 working days
- Bank rural nahi — MMFSL 4 lakh+ gaon

"Bank ne kitne chakkar lagwaye? MMFSL mein ek baar aao — ghar baith ke ho jaayega."
objections.other:
Reluctant Customer:

1. Problem sunno: "Aaj bina tractor ke kya takleef hai?" — sunne do.
2. Numbers dikhao: "Apna tractor = Rs.X kiraya bachega + Rs.Y fasal zyada"
3. Easy step: "Sirf Aadhaar lao aaj — koi aur kuch nahi."

Simplicity = conversion.
